info.title: Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version
info.description: A command line dotnet tool for generating reports and managing evaluation data.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Telemetry
The aieval .NET tool collects usage data in order to help us improve your experience. The data is anonymous and doesn't include personal information. You can opt-out of this data collection by setting the DOTNET_AIEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1' or 'true' using your favorite shell.

options.name: --path
options.description: Root path under which the cache and results are stored

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage

options.name: --path
options.description: Root path under which the cache and results are stored

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage

options.name: -n
options.description: Number of most recent executions to preserve. [default: 0]

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate a report from a result store

options.name: --path
options.description: Root path under which the cache and results are stored

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage

options.name: --open
options.description: Open the report in the default browser [default: False]

options.name: -n
options.description: Number of most recent executions to include in the report. [default: 10]

options.name: --format
options.description: Specify the format for the generated report. [default: html]
